user.title: Forage Season Setup
user.description: Connects to the iNaturalist '{project}' project to show edible plants and fungi in season near you. Latitude and longitude are pre-filled from your Home Assistant home location.

data.min_observations: Minimum observations to count as 'in season'
data.max_species: Maximum number of species to track

data_description.radius: How far from your location to search, in kilometres (5–500).
data_description.min_observations: Species with fewer historical observations in the current month will be ignored. Raise this to reduce noise.
data_description.max_species: Caps the number of sensor entities created. Species are ranked by observation count, so the most commonly found ones are kept.

abort.already_configured: A Forage Season entry for this location already exists.

error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Forage Season Options
init.description: Adjust search parameters. Changes take effect on the next daily refresh, or immediately after reloading the integration.

data.min_observations: Minimum observations to count as 'in season'
data.max_species: Maximum number of species to track

data_description.radius: How far from your location to search, in kilometres (5–500).
data_description.min_observations: Species with fewer historical observations in the current month will be ignored.
data_description.max_species: Caps the number of sensor entities created.
